User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account within the MBN school council application, storing their profile information, role, and application-specific data like experience points. This entity links to Firebase Authentication for core login but holds app-specific user data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity, corresponding to the Firebase Authentication User ID (UID). This is the primary key.

email.description: The user's email address, obtained from Firebase Authentication. Used for identification.

displayName.description: The user's display name or full name, typically obtained from their Google account or set within the application.

role.description: The assigned role for the user within the application. Possible values: 'Student', 'Teacher', 'Council', 'Administration'.

xp.description: Experience points gained by the user. Students start with 100 XP upon sign-in.

isSuperAdmin.description: A boolean flag indicating if the user has super administrator privileges, allowing full management access across the application.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created in the application's database.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account information was last updated in the application's database.

Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description: Represents an official announcement or update published by a user with the 'Council' role, displayed on a central board.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Announcement entity. This is the primary key.

title.description: The title or subject of the announcement.

content.description: The full text content of the announcement.

authorId.description: Reference to the User who published this announcement. Only users with the 'Council' role can publish. (Relationship: User 1:N Announcement)

publishedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the announcement was officially published.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the announcement was last updated.

status.description: The current status of the announcement (e.g., 'Draft', 'Published', 'Archived').

XPLog.title: XPLog
XPLog.description: Records every change in a user's XP, including the amount, the reason, and the administrator who performed the action.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Subcollection for each user tracking their XP history.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user receiving the XP change

definition.description: Contains all announcements published by users.

params.name: announcementId
params.description: The unique identifier for the announcement.

firestore.reasoning: XP history is modeled as a subcollection under each user to ensure high-performance per-user history queries and clear security isolation. Administrative actions trigger both a user profile update and an entry in this subcollection.
